Matched
0 OR 57
1 OR 60
2 OR 71
3 I 2
4 I 3
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 11011100
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 OR 57 = OR(I 5,I 7) = OR(1,0) = 1
1 OR 60 = OR(I 6,I 0) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 71 = OR(I 7,I 1) = OR(0,1) = 1
3 I 2 = 0
4 I 3 = 1
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 1
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{11101110}
